description: No hardcoded secrets in source code
fix: Move secrets to config/.env and access via get_settings()

description: No os.getenv() with hardcoded fallback defaults
fix: Use get_settings() or get_app_config() instead of os.getenv() with defaults

description: All YAML config files must have header comments
check: for f in config/settings/*.yaml; do head -1 "$f" | rg -q "^#" || echo "MISSING: $f"; done
fix: Add a commented header block describing the file's purpose and available options
